name: Lumari
long_description:
Lumari provides agentic AI automation for direct materials procurement and supply chain execution. The platform deploys always-on digital workers that run sourcing workflows, coordinate supplier communication, manage RFQs and track purchase orders end-to-end while continuously identifying risks across open orders.

Built to operate directly within existing tools like email and ERP systems, Lumari helps procurement teams move faster, eliminate operational bottlenecks and build more resilient supply chains.

To learn more check out https://lumari.io/
one_liner: AI Digital Workers for Supply Chain
